finding: BOLA: GET /books/{bookId}/loans and GET /loans/{loanId} return another member's loan/borrower history to any authenticated caller
mitigation: Object-level ownership check (caller==owner or borrower) on every /{id} route; return 404 when unauthorized; add two-member test

finding: JWT (email claim) and request bodies risk being logged to Application Insights via customDimensions, exposing member emails to anyone with Log Analytics read access
mitigation: Telemetry processor strips authorization/email/phone/address; log memberId not email; restrict workspace RBAC; set retention

finding: No rate limit on POST /books/{bookId}/borrow-requests (notification/Service-Bus spam) and on auth paths (brute force)
mitigation: Front Door rate-limit rules (100 req/min/IP on writes+auth); app-level cap 5 open borrow requests/member/hour; return 429 + Retry-After

finding: Missing Strict-Transport-Security and HTTPS-only enforcement confirmation; origin reachable outside Front Door
mitigation: Front Door HTTPS-only + redirect, min TLS 1.2, HSTS header; lock origin to Front Door via X-Azure-FDID + private link

finding: Free-text search over title/author/ISBN could be SQL-injectable if concatenated instead of parameterised
mitigation: Parameterise all queries; bind search via @q LIKE or Azure SQL full-text; add review/lint gate

finding: /health must be the only anonymous route; risk a new route is added without inheriting global JWT security, or /health added without security:[] override
mitigation: Explicit security:[] only on /health; CI contract test asserts every other path returns 401 without token; validate aud/iss/exp<=1h

finding: Connection strings must be in Key Vault via Managed Identity, never plaintext App Settings or .env in prod; ensure none are logged
mitigation: Key Vault references + system-assigned Managed Identity; key rotation; deny secrets in logs; .env git-ignored (local only)

finding: ZAP baseline WARN [10098] Cross-Domain Misconfiguration: over-permissive Access-Control-Allow-Origin (* on the mock). Wildcard CORS on an authenticated API lets any site call it with the user's credentials
mitigation: Front Door/middleware: set Access-Control-Allow-Origin to explicit BookSwap app origin(s) only; never * for authenticated API; do not reflect arbitrary Origin

finding: Service Bus digest/notify messages must reference memberId only, not email/address; worker resolves email at send time
mitigation: Queue payloads carry IDs only; resolve PII at delivery; do not persist PII in message body

finding: ZAP baseline WARN [10049] Storable and Cacheable Content: responses cacheable; authenticated/PII responses could be cached by shared proxies/browser
mitigation: Send Cache-Control: no-store (+ Pragma: no-cache) on all authenticated responses; only public non-PII reads may be cached

finding: Defence-in-depth security headers for completeness (CSP/X-Content-Type-Options/HSTS) even though baseline did not FAIL on them for this JSON API
mitigation: Add at Front Door rules engine: X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Strict-Transport-Security, CSP default-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
